description_en: Cologne may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 200 halal restaurants and 45 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Cologne, Germany, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Cologne: 150 halal restaurants listed, 45 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.9/5.
